title: SnowBoundSMP
description: this is a modpack for the SnowBound SMP
body:
This modpack contains a number of QoL improvements with some extras here and there. 

The modpack is not required, but does provide a better experience. 

*This pack has a pre-enabled shaderpack, so low end users beware, also, it has resource packs for a vanilla+ experience.*





**All contents of this pack is not owned nor created by me.**
